description: The first volume of the Original Sin Story — the genesis of every cycle that follows. Maria Moonlit, the prophet-queen renamed Alice Merry-Go-Round, conveys the gods' demand for vessels and sets Project 'Ma' in motion. Eve, Adam, and Seth are pulled into the experiment; Salmhofer the Witch flees with a forbidden secret; and in Held's forest a moonlit bear acts on a grief that will fracture into seven sins. Told from both Eve's and Adam's perspectives in its closing chapters.
